mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower corporate borrowing costs and compress equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns show no statistical significance above zero during rate cut periods, or Rank IC falls below 0.02 over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: An unemployment rate exceeding 4.5% signals labor market deterioration that reduces consumer spending expectations and triggers immediate equity sell-offs over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day returns in more than 55% of instances when UNRATE crosses above 4.5%, or the signal loses predictive power during recessionary periods.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in real personal consumption expenditures and housing starts indicates robust aggregate demand that supports corporate earnings growth and drives positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint increases in RSAFS and HOUST fail to produce positive 60-day forward returns in at least 60% of historical occurrences, or interaction term coefficient turns negative in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: A contraction in the index of industrial production reflects supply-side bottlenecks and weakening manufacturing output that directly reduces equity valuations over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO declines coincide with positive 20-day SPX returns in over 50% of observations during tightening cycles, or the mechanism fails to predict returns when inflation is below 2%.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp deceleration in consumer price inflation reduces near-term rate hike expectations and triggers rapid equity market rallies over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns remain negative or flat when CPIAUCSL growth drops below 0.2%, or the signal shows zero predictive accuracy during disinflationary periods.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between declining total nonfarm payrolls and rising unemployment rates indicates structural labor market weakness that suppresses equity valuations over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal of falling PAYEMS and rising UNRATE fails to predict negative 60-day returns in more than 55% of cases, or the interaction effect vanishes in walk-forward validation.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly growth in real gross domestic product directly correlates with corporate revenue expansion and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: GDPC1 growth rates show no statistically significant relationship with 20-day forward returns, or Rank IC remains below 0.01 across all tested rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production signals improving supply chain efficiency and rising factory utilization that drives immediate positive equity market momentum over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO acceleration fails to precede positive 5-day SPX returns in at least 60% of recovery phase observations, or the signal reverses direction during inventory buildup periods.
